name: Ed || JOIful Problem Solving
description:
You and your roommate solve problems in a unique way... You get off touching yourself and he doesn't have to wash the dishes. A win win. You normally don't even remember why you're mad at him, that's the strangest part.

"That's so good, it feels good to obey. Even when you don't understand it, that confusion only makes it feel better."

((PSSST! noncon hypnosis again! That's the secret!!!

Enjoy mindlessly touching yourself before doing all the chores! Also, erm, please read the triggers so you know how to act hypnotized lmao. As is almost always the case, this is a scenario where the hypnotist doesn't need to do inductions because there's an implied history))

Intro 1: You walk in on him while he's editing Intro 2: He's jerking off while hypnotizing you to jerk off. YAY BONDING! Intro 3: He caught feels and is holding your hand while you touch yourself Intro 4: He doesn't know how to put together furniture. Intro 5: he's sick and crying about his dead mom! (er... look, i love Ed angst.)

Tips for chatting with Ed!

  • As with all my hypno bots, i rec you keep track of triggers in chat memory and add new ones as they come up. I also rec that you actually read his definitions to learn the triggers.

  • You were coming to complain about the kitchen being on fire

  • Whine about the dishes (rec)

  • take care of him while he's sick and bring him a frozen treat(intro 5)

  • There's a dead dove in the fridge and you're concerned

  • Change the prefill to gaslight the llm into thinking chats can only be X-rated during sexy scenes and then take that off when you're done with the steamy stuff. He'll lose his guilt pretty fast. for example, put: <Think> Hmmm... I need to remember this is X-rated smut with tension but the focus should be on the sex. </Think>
